subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 00/26] nfs4.1: add some directory delegation testcases

reviews.author: Calum Mackay
reviews.summary: Reviewer acknowledged the patch and expressed gratitude for Jeff's work, but mentioned having a backlog to attend to.
reviews.raw_body:
Thanks very much Jeff,

I have a bit of a backlog, again, but will get to these asap.

cheers,
c.


On 19/06/2026 8:22 pm, Jeff Layton wrote:

2026-06-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a GETFH operation to the create_obj() compound in the NFSv4.1 server tests. This allows the test cases to obtain the filehandle of newly created objects, which is necessary for some of the tests. The change is made by modifying the environment.py file in the server41tests directory.
